changelog: v3.3.0 — Customer Display (second screen syncs running total), Cash Drawer (auto-open on checkout + manual button, ESC/POS), Reports analysis filter by product/category/supplier, Low Stock PDF export, Wholesale box sell-price update on purchase. v3.2.1 — UI scale slider, scrollable navbar, CSS cache-buster. v3.2.0 — Suppliers LBP payment, thermal 80mm receipt, Hold Sale, Edit Receipts/Purchases, Owner Cash Tracker, Box price display.
